title: onosma graeca
intro: Onosma graeca, also known as Greek Goldensal, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and golden-colored resin. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, alleviate rheumatic pain, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Onosma graeca include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the resin and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
